filteredNotice.message: No matches match the current filters.

glicko.p1: Glicko-2 is the rating system used in chess and by many competitive ladders. Unlike a raw win rate, it weighs who you beat and how surprising the result was.
glicko.p2: The ±number (RD) is uncertainty: it shrinks as you play more and grows when you're inactive — so a 1500 ±50 player is proven, a 1500 ±300 player is unknown.
glicko.p3: We use it because bracket play is bursty: Glicko-2 handles long gaps between tournaments and small samples far better than Elo or win-rate alone. Ratings here are unofficial and computed only from your synced/logged games.

hero.ignoresSourceFilter: Ignores the source filter above (time range still applies).

edit.title: Edit Match

empty.title: Track your GSP climb
empty.body: GSP (Global Smash Power) is Smash Ultimate's online quickplay ranking, tracked per-character. Log a quickplay match with the GSP shown on the results screen and this page will chart your climb, break down your win/loss gains, and estimate how far you are from Elite Smash.
empty.cta: Log a match on the Dashboard

header.title: GSP Tracker
header.subtitle: Global Smash Power is per-character and its exact formula is never published by Nintendo — everything below is an estimate built from your own logged matches and a community-reverse-engineered model of the hidden MMR behind GSP.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this GSP entry?
deleteConfirm.body: The match and its GSP reading are removed together — this action cannot be undone.
deleteConfirm.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the entry. Please try again.

hero.modelAccuracy: (±1 GSP in the main curve; tails approximate)
hero.computedCaption: computed · {{calibration}} · editing recalibrates the model — grab the current number from
hero.invalidThreshold: Enter a positive whole number — commas are fine, e.g. 10,300,000.
hero.recalibratedToast: Model recalibrated from your threshold reading!
hero.thresholdSaveFailed: Failed to save the Elite threshold. Please try again.

curve.title: GSP Curve
curve.mmrCaption: Estimated hidden MMR behind each reading (community-reverse-engineered model) — unlike GSP, it doesn't inflate over time, so a flat line means flat skill. Dashed line: Elite entry at MMR {{mmr}}.
curve.gspCaption: Every point is a logged post-match GSP reading for this fighter. The dashed line is the computed Elite Smash threshold — a community-model estimate, not a Nintendo-published value.
curve.clickHint: Click a point to edit that reading.
curve.locked: Log at least {{count}} matches with a GSP reading for this fighter to see the curve.

logger.title: Quick Logger
logger.chooseResult: Mark this match as a win or loss.
logger.invalidGsp: Enter the GSP shown after the match — commas are fine, e.g. 10,300,000.
logger.logFailed: Failed to log the match. Please try again.
logger.setGspButton: Set GSP without logging a match

gains.title: Gains Analysis
gains.empty: Log a few wins and losses with GSP readings to see your gain/loss trends.

tiers.title: GSP Tiers
tiers.empty: Log a match with a GSP reading for this fighter to see your tier.
tiers.atCeiling: You're at the estimated top of the ladder!
tiers.eliteProjected_one: ≈{{count}} net win to Elite Smash at your {{rate}}% recent win rate (community model estimate).
tiers.eliteProjected_other: ≈{{count}} net wins to Elite Smash at your {{rate}}% recent win rate (community model estimate).
tiers.equilibrium: At your {{rate}}% recent win rate, matchmaking has found your level — climbing takes a >50% win rate, not more matches.
tiers.capped: Your win rate is barely above 50%, so expected progress per match is tiny — a small bump shortens the climb dramatically.
tiers.attributionSuffix: — boundaries estimated from the community GSP model.

vsGlicko.title: Est. MMR vs Glicko-2
vsGlicko.caption: Your quickplay rating (estimated MMR for this fighter, community-reverse-engineered model) vs. your overall Glicko-2 rating (every fighter/session) — both normalized to 0-100 over this window since their raw scales are unrelated. Rating-vs-rating makes the shapes honestly comparable; divergence usually means your quickplay form differs from your overall form.

setGsp.title: Set GSP
setGsp.description: Record the GSP shown in-game right now — at the start of a session (GSP inflates while you're away) or after matches you don't want counted. Deltas and gain/loss stats restart from this baseline.
setGsp.label: Current GSP
setGsp.saveFailed: Couldn't save the reading. Please try again.

editReading.title: Edit GSP reading

shares.title: Share this review
shares.description: Choose what viewers will see. Match facts are always included; your opponent's notes and playlists are never shared.

shares.createdBody: Anyone with this link can view this review — no account needed.
shares.copyFailedToast: Couldn't copy — copy the link manually.
shares.reshareHint: Sharing again creates a new link with your current notes and tags — the old link keeps working and won't change.
shares.limitReached: Share limit reached ({{max}}). Revoke an old link to create a new one.
shares.mySharesDescription: Manage the review links you've shared. Revoking a link stops new access immediately.
shares.emptyBody: Share a VOD review from its Share button to see it listed here.
shares.tierViewHelper: The link holder can watch and read what you include — nothing on this review can be changed.
shares.tierEditHelper: A coach with this link can add and manage their own timestamped notes on this review. They can't touch your notes, the match details, or the VOD. Edit links expire after 30 days.
shares.revokeConfirmDescription: People who already opened it lose access now. Previews already posted in Discord may keep showing the old preview.
shares.sharedBadgeTooltip: This match has an active share link
shares.showDisplayNameUnavailable: Your account has no display name — set one in Profile to attach it
shares.deleteConfirmDescription: The link is already revoked — this only clears the record from your list. This can't be undone.
shares.deleteActiveConfirmDescription: This permanently removes the share and kills the link immediately — anyone with it loses access now. Previews already posted in Discord may keep showing the old preview. This can't be undone.
shares.bulkRevokeConfirmDescription_one: People who already opened this link lose access now. Previews already posted in Discord may keep showing the old preview.
shares.bulkRevokeConfirmDescription_other: People who already opened these {{count}} links lose access now. Previews already posted in Discord may keep showing the old preview.
shares.bulkDeleteConfirmDescription_one: This permanently removes the link and kills access immediately. Previews already posted in Discord may keep showing the old preview. This can't be undone.
shares.bulkDeleteConfirmDescription_other: This permanently removes {{count}} links and kills access immediately. Previews already posted in Discord may keep showing the old preview. This can't be undone.

advisor.noMyCharacters: Pick a primary or secondary character (or log a few matches) to get personalized recommendations.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.unlinkFailed: Failed to unlink. Please try again.
integrations.linkDescription: Link your {{provider}} account to automatically import your Smash Ultimate tournament matches. Imported games join your match pool with a competitive tag.
integrations.unlinkDescription: Already-imported matches stay in your history; new tournament results just stop syncing until you reconnect.

startgg.autoSyncDone: start.gg import complete: {{imported}} games from {{sets}} sets.
startgg.autoSyncFailed: start.gg import failed. You can retry from Settings → Integrations.

security.title: Security
security.descPassword: Change the password you use to sign in.
security.descResetOnly: Add password sign-in to your account.
security.resetExplainer: You currently sign in without a password. Sending a password reset email lets you set one up, so you can also sign in with your email and a password going forward.
security.resetSent: Reset email sent to {{email}}. Follow the link to add password sign-in.
security.noEmailBody: Your account has no password or email — sign-in works through parry.gg profile verification. Manage that link from <integrationsLink>Integrations</integrationsLink>.

password.minLength: Password should be at least 6 characters
password.weak: Password should be at least 6 characters.
password.requiresRecentLogin: For your security, please sign out and sign back in, then try again.

data.title: Your data

characterSelect.primaryDescription: Begin by selecting your primary fighters. You can search using the input below. To remove a character, simply click it again. When you're finished, press Save.
characterSelect.secondaryDescription: Begin by selecting your secondary fighters. You can search using the input below. To remove a character, simply click it again. When you're finished, press Save to begin using grandfinals.gg!
characterSelect.emptySelected: No fighters selected yet. Click a fighter below to add them.
characterSelect.saveFailed: Failed to save fighters. Please try again.

share.unavailableTitle: This review is no longer available
share.unavailableMessage: The link may have been revoked, or it never existed.
share.videoUnavailable: This VOD is no longer available.
share.ctaTitle: Your competitive memory, all in one place
share.ctaBody: grandfinals.gg is a free tracker for Super Smash Bros. Ultimate — log your matches and tournaments, review VODs with click-to-seek notes, scout matchups, and follow your GSP and rating over time. No account needed to look around; free to start.

coach.namePromptDescription: Your name will show next to any notes you add here.
coach.nameTaken: That name is already taken on this review — pick another.
coach.shareGoneToast: This coaching link is no longer available — your change wasn't saved.
